title: bee_cells.mjs update verb: door-validated in-place cell revision (kills hand-edit diff noise)
action: Add updateCell(root, id, patch) to lib/cells.mjs and CLI verb `update --id <id> --file <patch.json>|--stdin` to bee_cells.mjs per plan.md Shape: strict read (missing cell refused; corrupt JSON refused loudly, file untouched — readReviewStrict pattern); status door: only open|blocked updatable, claimed/capped/dropped refused with file byte-unchanged; field allowlist as a validator MAP (title/action/verify non-empty strings, files/read_first/deps/decisions string arrays, must_haves object, behavior_change boolean, lane in LANES, pbi string|null) — any key not in the map (id, feature, status, trace, tier, unknown) refuses the whole patch; post-merge invariant: standard/high-risk result requires non-empty must_haves.truths; atomic write; CLI refuses unknown flags and missing --id. Mirror both files byte-identical into .bee/bin/. Tests per plan matrix, red-first for the refusal paths.

truths: update on an open cell changes exactly the patched fields; status and trace are byte-stable
claimed, capped, and dropped cells refuse update with non-zero exit and a byte-unchanged file
a patch carrying id, feature, status, trace, tier, or any unknown key is refused whole
a corrupt cell file makes update fail closed without clobbering
a patch leaving a standard/high-risk cell without must_haves.truths is refused

artifacts.substantive: updateCell with validator-map allowlist, status door, strict read, atomic merge
update verb with --file/--stdin, strict flag validation
plan test matrix rows incl. refusal red-firsts

prohibitions: Do not allow status/trace/tier mutation through update (tier keeps its own verb)
Do not weaken or delete any existing test assertion

trace.outcome: updateCell + CLI update verb shipped: validator-map allowlist (title/action/verify/files/read_first/deps/decisions/must_haves/behavior_change/lane/pbi), status door open|blocked, strict-read fail-closed, frozen-key hints, post-merge truths invariant; mirrored to .bee/bin; 7 new suite checks
trace.verification_evidence: {"red_failure_evidence":"Before this cell, bee_cells.mjs had no update verb: `node .bee/bin/bee_cells.mjs update` returned `Unknown command \"update\". Use: list, ready, show, add, claim, verify, cap, block, drop, tier, judge.` (verb list read this session pre-change); two backlog friction items on record share the root cause (no revise/update verb -> rule-11 hand-edit -> full JSON diffs in the user working view, screenshot user report 2026-07-12).","after":"update verb live: open/blocked cells patch in one CLI line (215/0 suite incl. 7 new checks); claimed/capped/dropped + frozen/unknown keys + corrupt files refuse with file byte-unchanged (live smoke: claimed cuv-1 refused, invalid patch refused)."}
